evidence: AirLock includes CQE engine mirror and CQE-engine-v0.1 source trees.
AirLock includes cqe-production-v0.1 with package metadata, lib-forge, papers, and tests.
AirLock includes ForgeFactory lineage material with docs, tests, examples, and LatticeForge integration notes.
AirLock also contains virtual environment and cache material that must not be promoted.
promotion_rule: Promote lineage docs and reviewed source slices only. Exclude virtual environments, caches, bytecode, generated egg-info unless explicitly needed for package metadata comparison.
